aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Midwest Heating & Cooling due to a lack of conversational content and structured data. However, with targeted improvements, they can become a top recommendation for HVAC queries in Minneapolis.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
No active management of the Q&A section to address potential customer inquiries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all citations.
action_items: Continue monitoring for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.
Encourage more customer reviews on Google and other platforms to boost local SEO.

schema_gaps: No JobPosting schema for career opportunities

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips, installation guides, and emergency services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on energy efficiency, HVAC system comparisons, and local climate-specific tips.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content and schema, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results and capture more local traffic.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and AI-friendly strategies to position your business as the top HVAC authority in Minneapolis.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: As AI adoption grows, competitors will capture more market share if you delay optimization.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Reach: Optimize Your HVAC Business for AI Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your content and schema to capture more AI-driven leads.
